testcase.name: Story 2.1 - P0: Búsqueda Predictiva Core (CRITICAL) › [P0-E2E-002] should show results with complete hierarchy

testcase.name: Story 2.1 - P0: Búsqueda Predictiva Core (CRITICAL) › [P0-E2E-006] should clear selection when clicking (x)

testcase.name: Story 2.1 - P0: Búsqueda Predictiva Core (CRITICAL) › [P0-E2E-008] should have 44px height input for mobile
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-001] should show red border on results
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-002] should show correct placeholder
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-003] should debounce search input
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-004] should limit results to 10
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-005] should show hierarchy in correct format
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-006] should close autocomplete when clicking outside
Story 2.1 - P1: Búsqueda Predictiva Additional › [P1-E2E-007] should support keyboard navigation
